packages.title: TestFlight release readiness
packages.goal: Make the beta honest, private, observable, and submittable.

packages.title: Coach composer and learning loop
packages.goal: Turn measured practice history into an explainable next session.

packages.title: Flutter surface decomposition
packages.goal: Make the three large player surfaces independently testable without a redesign.

packages.title: Recommendation acceptance loop
packages.goal: Generate, explain, accept, and safely persist coach recommendations.

packages.title: Scoring trust
packages.goal: Make every displayed score measurable, interpretable, and safe under missing audio.

packages.title: English product consistency
packages.goal: Keep interface, coach output, voice, and generated practice content in the selected language.
